preconditions: Successful authentication redirects user to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify login page loads with correct URL and login form
steps: Wait for the page to fully load
testCases.expectedResult: Browser URL is http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined and the login form containing User Name field, Password field, and SIGN IN button is visible.

testCases.title: Verify User Name, Password fields and SIGN IN button are visible and enabled
testCases.expectedResult: User Name textbox and Password password field are visible and editable, and the SIGN IN button is visible and enabled for interaction.

testCases.title: Verify Home and Arrow Back controls are visible on login page
steps: Observe the navigation area of the page
testCases.expectedResult: Home control and Arrow Back control are visible and clickable on the login page.

testCases.title: Successful login with valid credentials using SIGN IN button
steps: Enter haklarr in the User Name field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: User is authenticated and redirected to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home and the home page is displayed indicating a logged-in state.

testCases.title: Successful login using Enter key from Password field
steps: Enter haklarr in the User Name field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
Press Enter while cursor focus is in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Login is submitted and the user is authenticated and redirected to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home with the home page visible.

testCases.title: Login fails with incorrect password
steps: Enter haklarr in the User Name field
Enter WrongPassword123 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, browser remains on the login page URL, and a visible login failure message is displayed indicating invalid credentials.

testCases.title: Login fails with incorrect username
steps: Enter invaliduser in the User Name field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the login page remains displayed, and an error message indicating invalid username or password is visible.

testCases.title: Validation when both username and password fields are blank
steps: Leave the User Name field empty
testCases.expectedResult: Login is not processed and visible required-field validation messages appear for User Name and Password while remaining on the login page.

testCases.title: Validation when username is blank and password is entered
steps: Leave the User Name field blank
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Form submission is blocked and a visible validation message indicates User Name is required while the page remains on the login screen.

testCases.title: Validation when password is blank and username is entered
steps: Enter haklarr in the User Name field
testCases.expectedResult: Form submission is blocked and a visible validation message indicates Password is required while the login page remains displayed.

testCases.title: Login attempt using whitespace-only values
steps: Enter spaces only in the User Name field
Enter spaces only in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Whitespace-only values are treated as invalid input and the login is rejected with validation or authentication error while the login page remains displayed.

testCases.title: Login with leading and trailing spaces around username
steps: Enter space haklarr space in the User Name field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Leading and trailing spaces are trimmed before authentication and the user is successfully logged in and redirected to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify password field masks entered characters
testCases.expectedResult: Typed characters are displayed as masked symbols such as dots or asterisks and the actual password text is not visible.

testCases.title: Login fails when password case is incorrect
steps: Enter haklarr in the User Name field
Enter icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails due to incorrect password case, the user remains on the login page, and an invalid credentials error message is visible.

testCases.title: Login fails when username case differs
steps: Enter HAKLARR in the User Name field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected and the login page remains visible with an invalid credentials error message displayed.

testCases.title: Verify Home control redirects to home page
testCases.expectedResult: Browser navigates to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home and the home page is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify Arrow Back control redirects to home page
testCases.expectedResult: Browser navigates to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home and the home page loads successfully.

testCases.title: Verify handling of extremely long username input
steps: Enter a username longer than 256 characters in the User Name field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Application does not crash and the login attempt fails with an authentication or validation error while the login page remains visible.

testCases.title: Login attempt with special characters in username
steps: Enter haklarr!@# in the User Name field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the user remains on the login page, and an invalid credentials or validation error message is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify multiple rapid clicks on SIGN IN button do not create duplicate submissions
steps: Enter haklarr in the User Name field
Enter Icstunnel1 in the Password field
Rapidly click the SIGN IN button multiple times
testCases.expectedResult: Only one authentication request is processed and the user is redirected a single time to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home without duplicate page loads or errors.

testCases.title: Successful login using copied and pasted credentials
steps: Copy haklarr and paste it into the User Name field
Copy Icstunnel1 and paste it into the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Credentials pasted into the fields are accepted and the user is authenticated and redirected to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.
